title: RTMD Gateway Provided Config
description: Pilot-managed provided config for the RTMD gateway service. Bootstrap-owned fields such as mdgw_id, env, nats_url, grpc_host, grpc_port, bootstrap_token, and instance_type are not part of this schema.

venue.description: Venue identifier, for example okx, binance, or simulator.

venue_root.description: Optional root path for manifest-driven venue module loading.

gateway_kv_prefix.description: NATS KV prefix used when registering MDGW discovery entries.

rtmd_sub_bucket.description: NATS KV bucket used to coordinate RTMD subscription leases.
